prose: **Nitrobenzene Fukui-reactivity indices** — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, exact four-center integrals, density fitting off) in PySCF via chemkit; single-point on the provided `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/nitrobenzene/nitrobenzene.xyz` geometry, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1.
